creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,i have problem with compilation on 13.1 RELEASE from ports

/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC    --mode=link cc -I/usr/local/include -pipe  -g -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -std=gnu89  -fvisibility=hidden -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -Wall  -no-install -fstack-protector-strong -o prime prime.o ../src/libgcrypt.la  ../compat/libcompat.la 
libtool: link: cc -I/usr/local/include -pipe -g -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -std=gnu89 -fvisibility=hidden -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -Wall -fstack-protector-strong -o prime prime.o  ../src/.libs/libgcrypt.so ../compat/.libs/libcompat.a -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/media/ST3000DM007-1WY10G_ZTT0SM4Q_p1/code/freebsd-ports/security/libgcrypt/work/libgcrypt-1.9.4/src/.libs -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..  -I../src -I../src   -I/usr/local/include -pipe  -g -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -std=gnu89  -fvisibility=hidden -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -Wall -MT basic.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/basic.Tpo -c -o basic.o basic.c
basic.c:315:16: error: inline assembly requires more registers than available
  asm volatile("movdqu %[data0], %%xmm0\n"
               ^
